_note: Cheapest possible fixture to prove the rig captures tokens/cost. Not a real task class.

single.prompt: In one sentence, list three benefits of unit testing. Reply with only the sentence.

workers.prompt: Name one benefit of unit testing in 5 words. Reply only with the phrase.
Name a second, different benefit of unit testing in 5 words. Reply only with the phrase.

combine.prompt: Combine these into one sentence: 'catches bugs early' and 'documents expected behavior'. Reply with only the sentence.
